title: calestania palustris
intro: Calestania palustris, also known as swamp calestania, is a plant species that belongs to the family Cunoniaceae. It is a shrub-like plant native to Australia, known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health issues. The plant has been traditionally used to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, Calestania palustris is often used as a tea or infused in hot water to relieve symptoms, and its leaves can also be dried and made into a powder for further use.
